iterations.title: Discovery: gap mechanic, constraints, and design decisions for lume review

verdicts.reason: Gaps relocated to .lume/gaps/ by child workstream 0016 - the discovery record describes the old repo-root gaps/ convention and must be redone against the new location

iterations.title: Planning: slice the lume review verb into plan items
Execution: emit side - charter gathering and protocol emission (P1+P2)
Execution: ingest side - validation, review folder, persistence, queue plan (P3+P4+P5)

plan.sketch: S1 Charter gathering: review.py module - PRIMARY lume-state collection (all workstreams' objectives, decisions, retros, plans), SECONDARY capped pattern scan (12 files / 8192 chars, sorted), --charter override, thin-coverage degradation; unit tests incl. no-docs fixture

S2 Protocol emission: seven-lens protocol + Result contract instructions, ecosystem-fit live-lookup and META review-gap directives; catalog entry, handle_review in cli/handlers/discovery.py, multi-value --charter flag; --json with labelled charter_sources; golden + byte-identical determinism tests
S3 review_result schema + ingest validation: schemas/review_result.json (validator subset), ingest path parsing, malformed/missing input -> usage exit 2; surfaced via lume entities/schema; tests

S4 Review folder + persistence: clock-dated review-<date>-NN slug with next-free daily sequence, findings.md renderer (the one sanctioned raw write), TrackingStore read_review/write_review in both backends; FixedClock sequencing tests (-01 then -02, no clobber)

S5 Queue-plan emission: proposed_workstreams -> lume new/plan add (taxonomy mapped), direction_decisions -> lume decide, review_gaps -> lume gap add; text + --json, never executed; handle_review_ingest in cli/handlers/authoring.py; gap-mapping tests

S6 Docs + sweep: SKILL.md and README document lume review emit/ingest and the review folder convention; diff sweep (no dead code, no second verb list, no parallel gap mechanic, no stray raw I/O, no hardcoded ecosystem lists)

workstream.title: Add lume review verb: deterministic adversarial self-review (emit/ingest)
